verse.es: "Sobre toda cosa guardada, guarda tu corazon."
verse.en: "Above all else, guard your heart, for everything you do flows from it."

es: Día 24. Guardar tu corazón no es cerrar el corazón. Es ser selectivo sobre qué entra. Es decir: no todo lo que ofrecen es veneno, pero tampoco todo es alimento.

Tu corazón es espacio sagrado. Lo que permitas entrar allí moldea quién eres. Si permites cruzar palabras hirientes, ideas derrotistas, compañías tóxicas, tu corazón se enferma. Si proteges con vigilancia, tu corazón florece.
La Escritura de hoy dice: "Sobre toda cosa guardada, guarda tu corazón." Es orden prioritaria. Guárdate. Protege tu interior. Eso no es egoísmo: es obediencia.
Hoy identifica qué entra en tu corazón y te enferma. Puede ser: relaciones que te restan, compromisos que no son tuyos, expectativas que no pediste cargar. Di no con claridad y con paz.

Tu sanación depende también de límites. De dones rechazados. De puertas cerradas con amor. El Señor no quiere que seas alfombra. Quiere que seas santuario. Protege tu corazón como si fuera la cosa más preciosa del mundo. Porque lo es.
en: Day 24. Guarding your heart is not closing your heart. It is being selective about what enters. It is saying: not everything offered is poison, but not everything is food either.

Your heart is sacred space. What you allow to enter there shapes who you are. If you allow hurtful words, defeatist ideas, toxic companionship to cross, your heart becomes ill. If you protect with vigilance, your heart blooms.

Today's Scripture says: "Above all else, guard your heart, for everything you do flows from it." It is a priority order. Guard yourself. Protect your interior. That is not selfishness: it is obedience.

Today identify what enters your heart and makes you ill. It could be: relationships that diminish you, commitments that are not yours, expectations you never asked to carry. Say no with clarity and with peace.

Your healing also depends on boundaries. On gifts rejected. On doors closed with love. The Lord does not want you to be a doormat. He wants you to be a sanctuary. Guard your heart as if it were the most precious thing in the world. Because it is.

prayer.es: Jesus misericordioso, pongo en Tus manos mi salud fisica, mental y espiritual. Restaura lo que esta herido, fortalece lo que esta debil y guiame por caminos de vida plena. Dame sabiduria para cuidarme, humildad para pedir ayuda y esperanza para no rendirme. Amen.
prayer.en: Merciful Jesus, I place my physical, mental, and spiritual health in Your hands. Restore what is wounded, strengthen what is weak, and guide me on paths of abundant life. Give me wisdom to care for myself, humility to ask for help, and hope to keep going. Amen.

act.es: Hoy haz una accion concreta de cuidado integral: hidratarte mejor, caminar, descansar a tiempo, reducir pantalla, pedir acompanamiento o rezar diez minutos en silencio por tu sanacion.
act.en: Today do one concrete act of integral care: hydrate better, walk, rest on time, reduce screen time, ask for support, or pray ten minutes in silence for your healing.
